title: ranunculus acris var. stevenii
intro: Ranunculus acris var. stevenii, also known as Steven's buttercup, is a plant species that belongs to the Ranunculaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Steven's buttercup include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and support the immune system, making it a valuable herb in herbal medicine. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly used to harness its medicinal properties.
